post.author: Alicia Co
post.title: It’s a Win ✨ for me! Now where can I post my offer?
post.body: 16h  • Personal WinsIt’s a Win ✨ for me! Now where can I post my offer?I did it!! I’m honestly so excited and proud of myself right now 🙌🏽I followed what Arlan said in the challenge..reaching out to people I’ve either helped before or who I know could truly benefit from my services… and it worked.He’s a rapper and a family friend, and I noticed from his social media that he’s starting to take his music more seriously. He just dropped a really catchy, line dance-type song (it’s actually really good), but I also noticed there was low engagement, no real marketing s... See more

post.author: Estasy Mi
post.title: I need feedback
post.body: 3d  • I Need Feedback 🎥I need feedbackHello! This is my first post on this platform. I need some feedback on my voice... I'm insecure about it. Thank you in advance!!23.04.2026 11.36.m4aAudio • 652kb

thread.author: Omidiora Moses
thread.text: You're welcome dear

thread.author: Omidiora Moses
thread.text: Your voice really sounds goodYou dis your best putting this out I love that 🥰

thread.author: Estasy Mi
thread.text: @Omidiora Moses thank you😭🥰

thread.author: Rakhi Panwar
thread.text: Welcome @Estasy Mi 🥰🥰 your voice is very beautiful and you are doing great👍 and for the feedback i would say try to explore your voice like sing loud and soft you will become get better just keep practicing☺️🥰

thread.author: Estasy Mi
thread.text: @Rakhi Panwar thank youuuu i will!🥰

thread.author: Nila Davis
thread.text: You have a great voice, and I would recommend exploring and working on your tone of voice

thread.author: Estasy Mi
thread.text: @Nila Davis Thank you so much!!🥰

thread.author: Victor James
thread.text: @Estasy Mi hello greetings how're you doing

thread.author: Terrell Harper
thread.text: Mi gusta

thread.author: Harry Edwards
thread.text: @Terrell Harper Hey HarperHow arw are you doing, how was the community treating you so far?

thread.author: Victor James
thread.text: You have a good voice I love that @Estasy Mi

thread.author: Estasy Mi
thread.text: @Victor James thank you✨

thread.author: Daniel Carter
thread.text: Keep coming back for more feedback. Would be amazing to see your progreess. And as I say this. . . Just noticed a certain post which proves exactly what I've said here. Well done!

thread.author: Estasy Mi
thread.text: @Daniel Carter thank you!!!✨

post.author: Branco De Souza
post.title: Fear of being seen…
post.body: Dec '25  • Phase 3 - Control/Agility Q&AFear of being seen…For a long time, posting anything online felt impossible for me, because I didn’t feel safe singing in public.I’m curious if anyone else feels this too?In the last few years I overcame this fear, it’s also about being scared of being authentic and being rejected.But I’m glad I can finally be seen for who I am online, even if it bothers some people. 🧡✨

comment.author: Estasy Mi
comment.text: @Daniel Carter thank you so much bro😭 i will!!

thread.author: Jessica Thompson
thread.text: Jessica Thompson • Dec '25Hello dear how are you doing so far

thread.author: Rob S
thread.text: Rob S • Dec '25I never had that issue, but have been told I am an odd duck. lol. Glad you were able to overcome it though!😎

thread.author: Branco De Souza
thread.text: Branco De Souza • Dec '25@Rob S Thank you! Hahahah odd duck that’s great! Being authentic some repels people for sure 😅 How long have you been singing for?:)

thread.author: Rob S
thread.text: Rob S • Dec '25@Branco De Souza 50+ years. I'm an old gray hair. lol. Until recently though haven't looked into serious education. Just had fun with it.

thread.author: Jo Bertsch
thread.text: Jo Bertsch • Dec '25 (edited)Yea, that's pretty much how I feel. Glad you were able to work through it :)

thread.author: Branco De Souza
thread.text: Branco De Souza • Dec '25@Jo Bertsch Thanks! I feel like liberating your voice is also about freeing your soul you know? How long how you been singing?:)

thread.author: Jo Bertsch
thread.text: Jo Bertsch • Dec '25@Branco De Souza about a year

thread.author: Pear Doll
thread.text: Pear Doll • Dec '25that's awesome that you overcame that! I feel like I still get nervous about posting things but I just do it anyways 😅

thread.author: Branco De Souza
thread.text: Branco De Souza • Dec '25@Pear Doll Aaah that’s great that you still do it!! How long have you been singing for?:)

thread.author: Pear Doll
thread.text: Pear Doll • Dec '25@Branco De Souza a long time 😅 pretty much since elementary school. I'm used to in-person from various choirs but online feels a bit different for me. I do live karaoke online more than I post recordings/covers but I'd love to post more. There's just some things I want to work on more before doing more recordings but I haven't done formal lessons in a years.

thread.author: Erica Dede
thread.text: Erica Dede • Dec '25I also had the same issue after intense criticism from friends that literally made me feel lost. But I decided to take it up the hill and rekindle that passion in me. Though I'm not good enough, I feel confident and comfortable to try new critics from different people

thread.author: Branco De Souza
thread.text: Branco De Souza • Dec '25 (edited)@Erica Dede Oh that must be hard to deal with! Congrats on rekindling your passion!!🔥 And there’s always room for improvement. What do you feel you need to improve mostly?:)

thread.author: Erica Dede
thread.text: Erica Dede • Dec '25@Branco De Souza my tone. But one thing I know is my tone won't improve until I've fully accepted the uniqueness of it. It may be weird to people but as far as it's pleasant to my in every recording it's enough

thread.author: Adam Wheeler
thread.text: Adam Wheeler • Dec '25As a millionaire living my best life, I'm giving $30k to the first 20 people who message me 'grace.' I understand that many people are struggling with bills, and I want to help reduce that burden.

thread.author: Firenze Banks
thread.text: Firenze Banks • Dec '25I struggle with this. Not singing specifically, but with posting to social media etc. Doing standup has helped me. I appreciate you posting about a common struggle - I feel seen!

thread.author: Daniel Carter
thread.text: @Firenze Banks Thanks for sharing, Firenze! The senses of belonging and community are part of what makes SINGULARITY so special. . .

thread.author: Lisa Bartolomucci
thread.text: Lisa Bartolomucci • Dec '25Hi there. Don't feel bad. I don't like being seen either. I have self esteem issues and think I don't look good enough. A lot of singers have good voices and are very attractive but I don't think I look good enough so it makes me depressed sometimes.

thread.author: Martyn Croston
thread.text: Martyn Croston • Dec '25Just go for it. The more you put yourself out there, the more you will grow as a singer. I'm a piano player and it can be daunting when you perform in front of people. But I think it's easier to hide your nerves when you play piano, compared to singing as you're more exposed. Look forward to hearing you sing!

thread.author: Henoc Martins
thread.text: Henoc Martins • Jan 9Just be you fam, we are in this together

thread.author: Ana H
thread.text: I can really relate to this. When I first started, I was shy, nervous, and my voice was shaky. I even held back from sending my vocals for feedback because I felt so vulnerable.I also used to never show myself on camera… but over time, I learned to turn it on. Nowadays, I actually enjoy storytelling, using my voice as the background music to what I create.But I realized that if I wanted to grow, I had to get comfortable with being uncomfortable.Never in a million years did I think I’d start shar

thread.text: @Daisy M how are you doingAre you open for a chat?

post.author: Nicole Henderson
post.title: Clarity
post.body: 19h  • Personal DevelopmentClarity This will be long, but it’s therapeutic for me.Hubby was listening to Les Brown this morning and I heard him say, “Be unstoppable” then I heard him say, “You MUST believe in what you are selling”.This morning before I heard that I woke up questioning my $100 offer, not because it isn’t good, but I keep asking myself why would someone buy it, so I went back to my chat convo with Arlan about my $100 ($97) offer and I typed this..I want to be unstoppable and I don’t think I truly believe in this of... See more

post.title: A Lesson in Turning Panic into Profit
post.body: 2d  • Personal WinsA Lesson in Turning Panic into ProfitWanted to share a real-world case study from my business this week, with a huge assist from Authority X Pro.The Scenario: 5 days until a live workshop. 0 seats sold.Instead of canceling, I worked with AXP to build and execute a "go-time" sales plan. The core of it wasn't just "post more," it was about sequencing:Day 1 (Warmest Money): Emailed past clients with a value-add bonus (a 1:1 call) instead of a discount. Landed the first sale here.Day 2-4 (Public Blitz): Used the momentum from the first... See more

post.author: Lucy Moore
post.title: Getting more comfortable posting on you tube
post.body: 11h  • Personal DevelopmentGetting more comfortable posting on you tube Personal growthBefore I came to YF5K, I had never posted a live video. Now that's all I do. Also I was terrified as to how I look, and most of what I would sound like because I am originally from the island of St. Lucia where we speak a French dialect and English. But since I met Arlan, all my videos are live, I am not afraid anymore because Arlan told us not to go after perfection, I am just posting it out there.I am getting more comfortable, one short I got over 200 and another over 300 views. I am very thankful for all Arlan and team teachings, blessings to all❤️👏🙏

post.author: Dorine Ballard
post.title: I stayed teachable, NOW look at my WINS
post.body: 11h (edited) • Personal WinsI stayed teachable, NOW look at my WINSI currently had a YouTube channel with 102 subscribers for years, but I hardly ever got on there to engage. After purchasing Arlan's YouTube Accelerator I decided to revamp and created a new page. My page went live maybe 4 hours ago, and I had only uploaded my welcome video. Now in just about 1 hour after posting my top 5 videos, I'm already at 164 views, 6 likes, 1 share and a Subscriber. I'm celebrating the small wins as I know only more extremes are to come 💪. I'm manifesting my 100k subscribers by the end of this year 💪💸💰🤑 Thank you  🌹

comment.author: Dorine Ballard
comment.text: Robinson I've already got 1k views in just a matter of hours, I'm interested in where it'll be by tomorrow night 🙏🏽🙌🏽

post.title: Your First 5K Challenge
post.body: 9h  • Product Help DiscussionYour First 5K ChallengeOn Day 4 of the Y5K Challenge and I’m mind blown. So many gems dropped, but my question is I know Arlan has always recommended YouTube as one of the best social media platforms, but I was just wondering thoughts on Facebook? I’m monetized, and the majority of my clients come from there. Should I do both or focus on one?

post.author: Dana LeDonne
post.title: 😲 I Did Something Crazy with My Unsubscribe's
post.body: 17h (edited) • General discussion😲 I Did Something Crazy with My Unsubscribe'sI have a very small list. I had a few unsubscribe- one was a potential high ticket client.So I did an experiment.Since I had their phone numbers, I sent a courtesy text to confirm it was not a mistake- stating they would only recieve this one text message & to text back MISTAKE to receive a link to re-subscribe or CONFIRM & they would no longer recieve texts or emails.Results: Each text message had an immediate response: MISTAKE !!*Important to note: stating they would only recieve 1 courtesy me... See more
